tiles.title: Wait Events
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(event,'unknown') AS event, SUM(data_point_value) AS waits FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='pg_wait_event' GROUP BY event ORDER BY waits DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: Database Cache Hit Ratio
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT datname, 100 * AVG(data_point_value) AS cache_hit_percent FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='pg_stat_database_blks_hit_ratio' GROUP BY datname ORDER BY cache_hit_percent ASC

tiles.title: Deadlocks and Conflicts by Database
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT datname, metric_name, SUM(data_point_value) AS events FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('pg_stat_database_deadlocks','pg_stat_database_conflicts') GROUP BY datname, metric_name ORDER BY events DESC

tiles.title: Database Size by DB
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(datname,'unknown') AS datname, MAX(data_point_value) AS bytes FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='pg_database_size_bytes' GROUP BY datname ORDER BY bytes DESC

tiles.title: Top Table Sizes
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("postgresql.table.name", relname) AS table_name, MAX(data_point_value) AS bytes FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('postgresql.table.size','pg_stat_user_tables_table_size_bytes') GROUP BY COALESCE("postgresql.table.name", relname) ORDER BY bytes DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Table Bloat Ratio
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT datname, schemaname, relname, 100 * MAX(data_point_value) AS bloat_percent FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='pg_stat_user_tables_bloat_ratio' GROUP BY datname, schemaname, relname ORDER BY bloat_percent DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Index Health
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT metric_name, SUM(data_point_value) AS value FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('pg_index_invalid_count','pg_index_unused_count','pg_index_unused_size_bytes') GROUP BY metric_name ORDER BY value DESC

tiles.title: Sequence Usage
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT datname, schemaname, sequencename, 100 * MAX(data_point_value) AS used_percent FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='pg_sequence_used_ratio' GROUP BY datname, schemaname, sequencename ORDER BY used_percent DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Statement Calls
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT query_short, MAX(data_point_value)-MIN(data_point_value) AS calls FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='postgres_pg_stat_statements_calls_total' GROUP BY query_short ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Mean Execution Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT query_short, MAX(data_point_value) AS mean_seconds FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='postgres_pg_stat_statements_mean_exec_time_seconds' GROUP BY query_short ORDER BY mean_seconds DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Statement Cache Hit Ratio
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT query_short, 100 * MAX(data_point_value) AS cache_hit_percent FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='postgres_pg_stat_statements_cache_hit_ratio' GROUP BY query_short ORDER BY cache_hit_percent ASC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Statement Rows
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT query_short, MAX(data_point_value)-MIN(data_point_value) AS rows FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='postgres_pg_stat_statements_rows_total' GROUP BY query_short ORDER BY rows DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Statement WAL Bytes
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT query_short, MAX(data_point_value)-MIN(data_point_value) AS wal_bytes FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='postgres_pg_stat_statements_wal_bytes_total' GROUP BY query_short ORDER BY wal_bytes DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Postgres Log Events
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset

tiles.title: Errors / Warnings
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE body_error_severity IN ('ERROR','FATAL','PANIC','WARNING')

tiles.title: Logs Over Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Logs by Severity
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(body_error_severity,'unknown') AS severity, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY severity ORDER BY logs DESC

tiles.title: Logs by Database
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(body_dbname,'unknown') AS database_name, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY database_name ORDER BY logs DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: Recent Error Logs
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, body_error_severity, body_dbname, body_user, body_application_name, body_message FROM $logs_dataset WHERE body_error_severity IN ('ERROR','FATAL','PANIC','WARNING') ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

tiles.title: Trace Spans
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $traces_dataset

tiles.title: Error Spans
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $traces_dataset WHERE span_status_code <> 0

tiles.title: Avg Span Duration
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT AVG(span_duration_ns)/1000000 AS value FROM $traces_dataset

tiles.title: P95 Span Duration
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.95)/1000000 AS value FROM $traces_dataset

tiles.title: Spans Over Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Span Duration by Operation
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("db.operation.name", span_name, 'unknown') AS operation, AVG(span_duration_ns)/1000000 AS avg_ms, approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.95)/1000000 AS p95_ms, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY operation ORDER BY p95_ms DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Spans by DB Operation
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("db.operation.name", 'unknown') AS operation, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY operation ORDER BY spans DESC

tiles.title: Slow Trace Queries
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, "db.namespace" AS database_name, "db.operation.name" AS operation, span_name, span_duration_ns/1000000 AS duration_ms, "db.query.text" AS query_text FROM $traces_dataset ORDER BY span_duration_ns DESC LIMIT 50

tiles.title: Metric Inventory
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT metric_name, COUNT(*) AS samples, MIN(p_timestamp) AS first_seen, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset GROUP BY metric_name ORDER BY samples DESC

tiles.title: Postgres Settings
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT metric_name, MAX(data_point_value) AS value FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name LIKE 'pg_settings_%' GROUP BY metric_name ORDER BY metric_name
